summary: Frontend navigation testing completed for LMS CozyTech. All navbar links, page navigation, active states, and footer visibility working correctly across all landing pages.

issues: Login page does not have navbar - this is expected behavior for auth pages but differs from requirement 'Each page should have the navbar'

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider adding navbar to login page if requirement strictly requires navbar on ALL pages including auth pages
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar component has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Active state highlighting works correctly using pathname comparison
Footer component properly included on all landing pages
Contact form has proper data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: No auth needed for public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation and landing pages tested and working. Navbar has correct links (Beranda, Daftar Kelas, Blog, About, Kontak, Masuk button). Active state highlighting works on all pages. Footer visible on all landing pages. Login page intentionally does not have navbar (standard auth page pattern).
tests_passed: Navbar visible on landing page (/) with correct links
Navbar 'Beranda' link is active/highlighted when on / page
/kelas page renders with course cards and search input
/tentang page renders with about info, mission/vision, stats
/kontak page renders with contact form (name, email, message inputs, submit button)
Footer is visible on all landing pages (/, /kelas, /blog, /tentang, /kontak)
Navbar active state changes on each page (Daftar Kelas highlighted on /kelas, Blog on /blog, etc.)
